## Checklist

- [ ] The PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat: ...`, `fix: ...`, `chore: ...`) — this is required by CI and drives the automated changelog/release.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated, if applicable.
- [ ] Documentation (`README.md`) was updated, if applicable.
